violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Walk-in cooler holding foods at 43*F. Disscussed food needs to be 41*F or below and maintained. Owners going to dial unit down some degrees and will call maintenance if needed.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Dishwasher tested 0 ppm CHL during inspection. Several attempts at priming the tubes unsuccsessful. Owners going to call for maintenance.
